response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, aligning well with the core requirements of the role. His background includes building scalable systems, API integrations, and user-facing portals, which matches the job's focus on energy consulting and renovation workflows. However, his experience leans heavily toward senior-level roles, and his lack of direct PostgreSQL or Nest.js exposure may require evaluation during the interview. The high on-site presence requirement could also be a consideration given his remote-heavy roles.
strengths: Strong fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple industries
Experience building scalable platforms and APIs, including integration with external systems (CRM, document management)
Proven ability to design and maintain user-facing portals and collaborative tools, relevant to the renovation workflow platform
concerns: Lacks direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB and SQL more broadly), a required skill for the role
Limited exposure to Nest.js, which is a required framework in the job description
Senior-level experience across roles may indicate overqualification or preference for more complex systems than this entry-level position offers
